name: Ultra HD Smart Watch
description: Advanced fitness tracking and crystal clear display. Features heart rate monitoring, GPS, and water resistance up to 50m.

name: Noise Cancelling Headphones
description: Immersive sound quality with active noise cancellation. Enjoy up to 30 hours of battery life and quick charging capabilities.

name: Wireless Charging Pad
description: Fast charging for all your Qi-enabled devices. Sleek design with non-slip surface and LED indicator.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: Waterproof speaker with 20-hour battery life. Powerful bass and 360-degree sound for any environment.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB lighting and responsive mechanical switches. Durable aluminum frame and customizable macro keys.

name: Ergonomic Gaming Mouse
description: High-precision sensor and customizable buttons. Ergonomic design for long gaming sessions with adjustable DPI.
